title: baeckea preissiana
intro: Baeckea preissiana, also known as the Lemon Myrtle, is a shrub native to the tropical rainforests of Australia, particularly in Western Australia and Northern Territory. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Baeckea preissiana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, relieve stress and anxiety, and provide antioxidant protection. Baeckea preissiana is often prepared as a herbal tea, oil, or powder, which can be used to make a variety of products, including skincare and aromatherapy items.
